name: codex-task-dashboard
description: Local real-time dashboard for Codex project tasks, goals, plans, and automations.

interface.shortDescription: Monitor Codex tasks, progress heartbeats, and schedule signals.
interface.longDescription: Codex Task Dashboard provides a local browser dashboard for scanning recent Codex threads, live-ish task heartbeats, project grouping, goal and plan summaries, and local automation schedule signals. It reads local Codex session, process, and automation files and serves a high-fidelity operational console matching the approved dashboard design.
